core_mechanism: Counting the dimension of the null space (harmonic, zero-eigenvalue modes) of a combinatorial Laplacian operator by iterated Rayleigh-quotient minimization with deflation, taking the kernel dimension as a topological invariant of the underlying complex
brief_reason: The method recasts Betti-number estimation as null-space counting of combinatorial Laplacians solved as a Rayleigh-quotient minimization with variational deflation, sequentially locating and removing zero-eigenvalue modes to count the kernel dimension.
